response.justification: Exceptional fit across core requirements. Candidate demonstrates 16+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React expertise, far exceeding the 6+ year threshold. Current role provides hands-on AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling experience, directly addressing explicit job requirements. Strong testing mindset and craftsmanship approach evident throughout career. Primary gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Vitest not mentioned) rather than conceptual—learnable for someone at this seniority. Kotlin absent, though Java is present. Overall, a senior contributor ready for immediate impact on internal automation tooling.
strengths: 16+ years full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS CDK, substantially exceeding experience requirement; demonstrates career-long depth in primary stack
Current hands-on focus on AI agent infrastructure, MCP frameworks, and developer tooling at re:cinq—directly matching job's explicit AI agent development requirement

Proven testing mindset and software craftsmanship (TDD workshops, code review culture, open-source testing libraries) woven throughout career, with demonstrated ability to establish quality practices across teams
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack; reliance on general Node.js expertise to transfer framework knowledge
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) absent from resume; testing rigor is evident but exact framework familiarity unclear
Secondary language Kotlin not in skill set (Java present instead); limited multi-cloud visibility beyond AWS CDK (GCP, Azure not mentioned)
